PriceListItemTypeEnum.description:
Price list item type.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
1   Card   Card.   
2   Text   Text.    
3   Service   Service.   
4   Complete   Complete.   
5   Product   Product.   
6   Suite   Suite.

PriceVatTypeEnum.description:
Price type enum.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   WithoutVat   Price does not include VAT.   
1   WithVat   Price includes VAT.   
2   ReverseCharge   Reverse charge is applied (price is without VAT and VAT is not computed). Used only in Czech version.   Used only in Czech version

VatRateTypeEnum.description:
Vat rate type.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   ZeroVatRate   Zero VAT rate.   
1   BasicVatRate   Basic VAT rate.   
2   FirstReducedVatRate   First reduced VAT rate.   
3   SecondReducedVatRate   Second reduced VAT rate.

PriceListItemAvailableQuantityDto.description: Price list item available quantity dto.

EffectiveAvailableQuantity.description:
Effective available quantity.
Computed like AvailableQuantity - ReservedQuantity - ComplaintQuantity.

PriceListItemWithSellingPricesDto.description: Price list item with selling prices dto.

PriceListItemSellingPriceDto.description: Selling price of price list item or price list sub item.

SellingPriceValidityTypeEnum.description:
Selling price validity type.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   Permanent   Permanent.   
1   TimeLimited   Time limited.   
2   Suspended   Suspended.

AdditionalEnglishTextForPrint.description: Information in printed documents in English

EntityCreatedResponseDtoOfPaymentMethodD.description: Common class for all entity created api responses.

WarningCodeEnum.description:
Warning codes.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   None   No warning.   
1   Unspecified   Unspecified warning (code). Warning is described only by message.   
2   SellingPriceCodeDoesNotExist   Selling price code specified in request does not exist.   
3   BusinessPartnerDoesNotExistAnyMore   Business partner specified in request no longer exists.   
4   BusinessPartnerDeliveryAddressDoesNotExistAnyMore   Business partner delivery address specified in request no longer exists.   
5   DocumentInHomeCurrencyCanNotHaveFilledExchangeRate   Document in home currency can not have filled exchange rate.   
6   DocumentInForeignCurrencyCanNotHaveRounding   Document in foreign currency can not have rounding.

PaymentMethodTypeId.description: Payment method type id. If not filled, cash will be used.

AdditionalEnglishTextForPrint.description: Information in printed documents in English

GeneralListItemModificationInfoDto.description: Genera list item modification info DTO.

ExchangeRateSetDto.description: Exchange rate set (exchange rates for all currencies in one day).

ExchangeRateDto.description: Exchange rate (exchange rate value for specific currency).

IsSynchronizationToPhEnabled.description: Flag specifying whether document synchronization to POHODA is enabled.

IsReverseCharge.description: Flag specifying whether document has reverse charge.

ForeignCurrencyUnitPrice.description: Foreign currency unit price. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

ForeignCurrencyWithoutVat.description: Foreign currency without vat. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

ForeignCurrencyVat.description: Foreign currency vat. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

ForeignCurrencyTotalPriceWithoutRounding.description: Total price without rounding in foreign currency. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

ForeignCurrencyTotalPrice.description: Total price in foreign currency. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

ForeignCurrencyRoundingAmount.description: Rounding amount in foreign currency. Filled only if document is in foreign currency.

VatRoundingTypeEnum.description:
VAT rounding type.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   None   Do not round.   
4   NoneEveryRate   Do not round every rate.

DocumentRoundingTypeEnum.description:
Document rounding type.

Enum member description:

Number value   String value   Description   Warning
0   None   Do not round.   
1   MathToOne   Round mathematically to whole number.   
2   MathToHalf   Round mathematically to 50h/50 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
3   MathToTenth   Round mathematically to 10h/10 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
4   UpToOne   Round up to whole number.   
5   UpToHalf   Round up to 50h/50 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
6   UpToTenth   Round up to 10h/10 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
7   DownToOne   Round down to whole number.   
8   DownToHalf   Round down to 50h/50 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
9   DownToTenth   Round down to 10h/10 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version   
10   MathFiveCent   Round mathematically to 5 cents. Used only in Slovak version. Used only in Slovak version
